title: viola × inouei
intro: Viola × inouei, also known as hybrid Japanese violet, is a unique and rare plant that is a hybrid of Viola mandshurica and Viola japonica. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Viola × inouei include its potential to reduce stress, improve mood, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Viola × inouei can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and are often used to calm the mind and soothe the body.
